@graph.name: Silvi Haldipur — Commercial Executive, Life Sciences and Consumer Health
@graph.description: Silvi Haldipur is a commercial executive in life sciences and consumer health with twenty years of experience installing the next commercial capability inside Fortune 500 organizations before consensus, and building the operating discipline to make it last. Her work spans launches that have defined categories, new commercial functions, operating model redesigns, and behavioral data systems across both US and international commercial operations in six priority markets.

@graph.jobTitle: Commercial Executive, Life Sciences and Consumer Health
@graph.description: Silvi Haldipur is a commercial executive with twenty years of experience building the capabilities the pharma and consumer health industries had not yet named. Her work installs the next commercial capability inside Fortune 500 organizations before consensus and builds the operating discipline to make it last. The pattern spans customer experience as a commercial discipline, agile in commercial operations, advanced consumer segmentation, AI-powered behavioral intelligence, and persistence-based care design.
knowsAbout: Customer experience as a commercial discipline
